channel.title: CAIF BBP / VDP Program Feed
channel.description: Static RSS feed for community-reviewed bug bounty and vulnerability disclosure program metadata.

item.title: BBP Zeko Protocol
item.description: HackenProof | $300 - $3,000 | Targets: source code | New | Protocol security program surfaced in the public opportunity feed for source-code review awareness.

item.title: BBP Teleboy
item.description: Compass Security | $128 - $6,400 | Targets: domain | New | Domain-focused web security program candidate for researchers who prefer traditional web application scope.

item.title: BBP Morpho Midnight
item.description: Cantina | $400,000 | Targets: python, solidity, source code | New | High-value smart contract and source-code security competition for advanced protocol researchers.

item.title: BBP DreamX HODLBonus
item.description: HackenProof | $0 - $6,000 | Targets: source code | New | Source-code review opportunity listed for researchers tracking newly opened bounty programs.

item.title: BBP SuperEarn Web & Smart Contract
item.description: HackenProof | $100 - $30,000 | Targets: domain, source code, wildcard | Open | Mixed web and smart contract research opportunity for broad attack-surface review.

item.title: BBP Faberlic
item.description: Standoff365 | $12,000 | Targets: other | Open | Program candidate from Standoff365 for researchers monitoring non-traditional target categories.

item.title: BBP ADI Predictstreet SC Dual
item.description: HackenProof | $0 - $10,000 | Targets: source code | Open | Source-code security research opportunity for reviewed submissions under program-specific rules.

item.title: VDP Public VDP Intake Example
item.description: CAIF Community Register | No bounty listed | Targets: domain, web app | Needs Verification | Example VDP entry showing how public vulnerability disclosure programs appear in the CAIF feed.
